items.title: Utah firefighter and four family members killed in flash flooding
items.dek: A husband, wife and their three sons died - meaning that only a daughter who did not join the outing is still alive.
items.body: A husband, wife and their three sons died - meaning that only a daughter who did not join the outing is still alive.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: JD Vance says wife Usha and son 'happy and healthy' after birth of fourth child
items.dek: The couple welcomed their fourth child, Alec Neel Vance, on Sunday morning.
